Use STMatilda Fonts in ggplot2

dav_use_matilda.Rd

This function returns a ggplot2 theme component that sets the font family to "STMatilda" (Text or Info variants). It is designed to be added to any ggplot object or theme.

Usage

dav_use_matilda(type = c("text", "info"), base_size = NULL)

Arguments

type

Character string, either "text" or "info". Determines which font family to use. Defaults to "text".

  • "text": Uses "STMatilda Text Variable Roman"

  • "info": Uses "STMatilda Info Variable Roman"

base_size

Optional numeric. If provided, sets the base font size for the plot text.

Value

A ggplot2::theme object.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
library(ggplot2)

# Use with default theme
ggplot(mtcars, aes(mpg, wt)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Matilda Text Font") +
  dav_use_matilda("text")

# Use with theme_kjn or others
ggplot(mtcars, aes(mpg, wt)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Matilda Info Font") +
  theme_minimal() +
  dav_use_matilda("info", base_size = 14)
} # }
